title: Lord Of Free Time
description: Atmospheric, immersive, challenging with dark magic and steampunk undertone themed modpack. (Builded around Aeronautics.)
body:
**🛠️This modpack is still in Alpha version. I don't plan any drastic changes in the future with mod selection and core direction, but there is still a need for better configuration, balance, and mod integration + some custom content such as a modpack guidebook. I plan to iterate on modpack like Mojand does updates.🛠️**

![Derivative Name of Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4789d53e770a33393e70d89287465ed4d47f354b.png)

### Author's Note / Preface:
At the core modpack is aiming at a new or returning (more matured) players backs to the game and want to try to play a little bit of everything from mods. It build around its theme with carefull balance and dedication to its core mechanics, but not being hardcore in any direction. I build this around mainly Aeronautic mod, adding compatible mods, themed mods, manually balancing with opinions. 
This modpack does not without any though put together all popular mods, that add stuffs that looks cool, but are useless like bunch of opinionated world generations mods that add useless clutter or broken mechanism that brings the end game too soon or is out of theme.
From older versions and tablesheet you could also see variety of design direction, but not it is settle and older vserions will be deleted, but overall theme will prevail. (also this descripption is big subject of change)


## Atmospheric, immersive, challenging with dark magic and steampunk undertone themed modpack.

Reborn to these forgotten lands. You'll explore its stunning beauty, uncover hidden past, survive harsh places, immerse in ambient environments, find friends, foes and abominations rooted in darkness.

### Main features:
- ✨🫧 New and stunning visuals such as new clouds, water interaction, new sounds, new animations ...
- 🍂🌳 Lands change with seasons and trees fall down. Don't freeze to death or get heat stroke. Find appropriate plants and suits.
- 💧🧊 Keep yourself hydrated, you need to purify water. And be careful with injuries.
- 🌽🫕 Cook, bake, brew, hunt, get drunk and farm to your heart's desire. Keep your diet diverse to get gains.
- 🌊⛵️ Build your ship and sail across the sea. Battle your friends and foes. Navigate with antique map to undiscovered lands and back.
- 📸🌌 Capture your moments onto film or use a spyglass to draw constellations onto the night sky and share them with friends. Build your lore and spread it.
- 🛌🏼🏮 Many quality blocks for building and designing.
- 🎨🎲 Paint your masterpiece. Play dices with your friends. Excave history of these lands. Write novels or taxes. Play music to audience. Send parcels to your friends. And much more fun things to do that were expanded onto in modpack ...
- ⛏💣 Challenging spelunking. Caves will tremble and fill up with foes, will you dare to step into it? Don't forget to take lantern into your second hand and chalk so you can navigate back through unforgiving caves and dungeons.
- 🔮⚗️ Dark magic to manipulate souls, sacrifice villagers to gods, slaughter enemies with powerful spells and apply theurgy to multiply ores.
- ⚙️🧰 Automate and build to your steampunk heart's desire. Build airplains, flying contraptions, .
- ⚔️🎏 Fight to survive. Then fight to thrive. Challenge the strongest, use magic, muskets, and legendary weapons to conquer the land.

BTW:
You don't need server to play with few of your friends with [World Host](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host) mod (included in modpack).

# Road map:
### Alpha ~> Beta release
- Have stable modpack with defined direction
- Have all configuration sorted (including concept one)
- Remove "bad" mods
- Stress test modpack

### Beta ~> Full release
- Expand on core modpack design
- expand on configs and mods interactions between them selfs
- Add quest book (&tutorial book) and lore (barebone, using Almanac For Spyglass Astronomy)
- Stress test modpack

### Next Iteration
- themed updates more on in (spread sheet)
- every new mod being already configured and compatible
- Expand on quests and lore

# Credits:
All mods are in chanelog for each version or [here 🌐](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1K_hK09gsSnKXWulBYQ5LwRJw1BU99vtYz3fsHOKCiyE/edit?usp=sharing) with author's names, my notes.

If there is mistake in list, spreadsheet, bug in modpack or any different problem. Please contact me through discord link (dm me on discord).
